value.found_quote:
Running Codex as an MCP server

You can run Codex as an MCP server and connect it from other MCP clients (for example, an agent built with the [OpenAI Agents SDK MCP integration]
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes running Codex as an MCP server, including the command `codex mcp-server` and integration with the OpenAI Agents SDK. No deprecation or sunset language is present, so it is treated as active.
